en.title: Best Gas Grills 2026
en.description: The propane grills I would actually buy heading into Memorial Day weekend, from the $599 Weber Spirit E-425 to the $2,099 Napoleon Prestige 500.

zh-tw.title: 2026 瓦斯烤肉爐排行榜
zh-tw.description: 從 NT$18,000 的 Weber Spirit E-425 到 NT$65,000 的 Napoleon Prestige 500，這幾台是國殤日週末我真的會買回家的瓦斯烤肉爐。

en.description: Three PureBlu tapered burners, 39,000 BTU, 531 sq in cooking area, cast-iron grates, 10-year warranty — the Genesis that finally feels like the modern upgrade.

zh-tw.description: 三支 PureBlu 漸縮燃燒管、39,000 BTU、531 平方英寸烹飪面、鑄鐵爐架、10 年保固，新世代 Genesis 真的有現代化的感覺。

zh-tw.description: 四口燃燒器加上兩支 Boost Burner 強化 Sear Zone、Snap-Jet 電子點火、10 年保固，Wirecutter 2026 年綜合首選。

en.description: Three burners, 30,000 BTU, 424 sq in, folding side shelves, Weber's 10-year burner warranty — the smallest Weber I would trust as a daily cooker.

zh-tw.description: 四口 12,200 BTU 主燃燒器、10,600 BTU 中央 Sear 燃燒器、12,000 BTU 側邊燃燒器、表面 750°F、430 不鏽鋼上蓋，Weber 旗艦機種。

en.description: Five Dual-Tube burners, 55,000 BTU, 875 sq in total, Flav-R-Wave system, rear rotisserie standard, built in North America with cast iron throughout.

zh-tw.description: 五支 Dual-Tube 燃燒器、55,000 BTU、875 平方英寸、Flav-R-Wave 導熱系統、後置旋轉烤標配，北美製造、全機鑄鐵。

en.description: Four 15,000 BTU welded stainless burners, 60,000 BTU total, 810 sq in, 14-gauge 304 stainless throughout, internal lights, lifetime warranty on housing and grates.

zh-tw.description: 四支 15,000 BTU 焊接式不鏽鋼燃燒器、總 60,000 BTU、810 平方英寸、整機 14 號 304 不鏽鋼、內建照明、外殼與爐架終身保固。

competitors.name: Char-Broil Performance Series 4-Burner with Sear Burner

en.description: Four 36,000 BTU main burners, dedicated 13,000 BTU side sear burner, porcelain-coated cast-iron grates, 425 sq in main area — the sub-$400 pick that actually sears.

zh-tw.description: 四口 36,000 BTU 主燃燒器、13,000 BTU 獨立 Sear 側燃燒器、瓷釉鑄鐵爐架、425 平方英寸主烹飪面，萬二有找又真的能煎出焦痕的少數選擇。

en.description: Four 12,000 BTU main burners plus side burner and side sear, ClearView window, LED control knobs, 304 stainless burners — the value pick under $500.

zh-tw.description: 四口 12,000 BTU 主燃燒器加側燃燒器與 Sear 側燃燒器、ClearView 觀察窗、LED 旋鈕背光、304 不鏽鋼燃燒器，預算萬五內最強性價比。

zh-tw.description: 五支主燃燒器、總 60,000 BTU、側燃燒器、632 平方英寸主烹飪面，預算萬元出頭想要五口加側燃燒器的入門首選。

references.title: 11 Best Gas Grills of 2026 [Propane & Natural Gas]
Weber Genesis E-325: Expert Tested and Reviewed 2026
Weber Summit E-470 And S-470 Gas Grill Review
Napoleon Prestige 500 Connected Grill: Gas Grill Perfection?
Broil King Regal Review: S490, S590, Pro IR & Built-In Grill Models Compared
Monument Grills Review: Are They The Best Value Gas Grills in 2026?

en.commentary: Memorial Day eve and I am locking the gas-grill chart with a verdict that surprised even me. The Weber Spirit E-425 takes first at $599, ahead of the Genesis E-325 at $849 and the Napoleon Prestige 500 at $2,099. The Spirit E-425 is the rare grill that gets the math right at every level: four burners with two Boost Burners feeding a true Sear Zone, Snap-Jet electric ignition that fires every time, the full Weber 10-year warranty, and a price that lands $250 below the comparable Genesis. Wirecutter named it their 2026 overall pick for the same reasons. The Genesis E-325 holds second because the PureBlu tapered burners and the cast-iron grates are a genuine quality jump that justifies the extra $250 if you grill more than once a week. Napoleon Prestige 500 takes third on raw cooking power, 82,000 BTU of main burners plus a 1,800°F Sizzle Zone plus an 18,000 BTU rear infrared rotisserie that costs another $400 as an add-on on every other grill here. The lifetime warranty seals the deal for the buyer who actually wants their last grill. Weber Summit S-470 sits fourth not because it is worse than the Genesis, but because the $2,499 ask makes the Napoleon look like a steal in head-to-head. Skip the Royal Gourmet unless you absolutely cannot stretch past $329, the welds and the cart hardware tell you exactly how long it is going to last. For the Memorial Day buyer who shows up at Home Depot this weekend with one decision to make, walk to the Spirit E-425 and write the check.

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 is the only gas grill I am recommending under $1,000 this year
highlights.body: The Spirit E-425 at $599 is the cleanest value play in the entire category. Four burners with two Boost Burners feeding a dedicated Sear Zone gets you 40% more heat density in the searing area than the standard Spirit. Snap-Jet electric ignition fires on the first click every time, which is the difference between a grill you use four nights a week and a grill that sits under a cover. The 10-year warranty on burners, grates, and lid is the strongest in the under-$700 segment by a wide margin. Wirecutter, T3, Tom's Guide, and GearJunkie all converged on this as the 2026 best overall pick within weeks of release, and after two months of testing I agree with the verdict.

highlights.title: Weber Genesis E-325 earns the upgrade premium
highlights.body: At $849 the Genesis E-325 is $250 more than the Spirit E-425, and that gap buys you something real. The PureBlu tapered burners modulate cleaner at low end, which matters for indirect cooking and reverse-sear. The heavy cast-iron grates hold sear marks deeper than the Spirit's coated grates. The cabinet base hides the propane tank and gives you usable storage instead of an open frame. If you grill more than once a week and you are going to keep this grill for ten years, the Genesis is the right call. If you grill twice a month, the Spirit is the smarter buy.

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 is the right grill to buy if it is your last grill
highlights.body: The Prestige 500 RSIB at $2,099 has the strongest pure cooking power on the list: 82,000 BTU across four main burners, a 16,000 BTU Sizzle Zone that hits 1,800°F for steakhouse sears, and an 18,000 BTU infrared rear rotisserie that ships standard. Every competing grill at the price charges extra for the rotisserie burner. The lifetime warranty on the burners and grates is the strongest in the category. The Napoleon is the grill for the homeowner who is done buying replacement grills and wants the one they will pass to the next owner of the house.

highlights.title: Char-Broil Performance Series is the only sub-$400 grill that actually sears
highlights.body: At $379 the Performance Series 4-Burner with Sear Burner gives you a dedicated 13,000 BTU side sear burner, which is the feature that separates competent grills from disappointing ones in the budget tier. Porcelain-coated cast-iron grates hold heat well enough to leave proper marks. The build is not Weber-tier, the cart hardware will wobble after two seasons, and the lid is thinner than I would like. For the first-time gas grill buyer who wants to find out if this hobby is going to stick before committing $600 to Weber, this is the right starting point.

highlights.title: Skip the Royal Gourmet GA5404B unless your absolute ceiling is $329
highlights.body: The GA5404B gets you five burners and a side burner for $329, which on paper looks like five-burner Weber money divided by three. In practice the welds at the burner mounts develop spot rust within a single season in humid climates, the lid temperature gauge reads 60°F off, and the cart hardware loosens after about fifteen cookouts. If $329 is truly your ceiling and you would otherwise buy charcoal, this beats charcoal for the convenience. Stretch to the Char-Broil at $379 and you get a meaningfully better grill for fifty bucks more.

zh-tw.commentary:
國殤日前夕，瓦斯烤肉爐這個榜單我鎖定了一個連自己都意外的結果。Weber Spirit E-425 以 NT$18,500 拿下第一，贏過 NT$27,000 的 Genesis E-325 跟 NT$65,000 的 Napoleon Prestige 500。

Spirit E-425 是少數每個層面數學都對的烤肉爐：四口燃燒器加上兩支 Boost Burner 餵養一個真正的 Sear Zone、Snap-Jet 電子點火每次第一下就燃、完整 Weber 10 年保固，定價還比同級 Genesis 便宜 NT$7,500。Wirecutter 把它列為 2026 年綜合首選，理由跟我完全一樣。

老實說，Genesis E-325 守第二是因為 PureBlu 漸縮燃燒管加鑄鐵爐架是真材實料的品質升級，一週開火超過一次的人多花 NT$7,500 換這個升級是值得的。

講真的，Napoleon Prestige 500 第三是靠純粹的火力，82,000 BTU 主燃燒器加 1,800°F 的 Sizzle Zone 加 18,000 BTU 後置紅外線旋轉烤，而那個旋轉烤在其他同價位機型上都要再加 NT$12,000 才有。終身保固是壓死駱駝的最後一根稻草，給真心想買最後一台烤肉爐的買家。

Weber Summit S-470 第四不是因為它輸給 Genesis，是 NT$78,000 的價格讓 Napoleon 看起來像是在搶錢。

Royal Gourmet 除非預算真的卡死在 NT$10,200 不能再多，不然不要買，焊點跟推車五金一看就知道撐不了多久。國殤日週末會走進大賣場、只有一次決定機會的買家，直接走向 Spirit E-425 把卡刷下去就對了。

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 是今年我唯一願意推薦的 NT$20,000 內瓦斯烤肉爐
highlights.body: Spirit E-425 在 NT$18,500 是整個品類最乾淨的價值算數。四口燃燒器加上兩支 Boost Burner 餵養獨立 Sear Zone，讓 Sear 區的火力密度比標準 Spirit 多 40%。Snap-Jet 電子點火每次第一下就燃，這是「一週開四次火」跟「永遠蓋著防塵罩」之間的差別。燃燒器、爐架、上蓋的 10 年保固在 NT$22,000 以下這段大幅領先所有對手。Wirecutter、T3、Tom's Guide、GearJunkie 在上市幾週內全部把它選為 2026 年綜合首選，我自己連續測兩個月後完全同意這個結論。

highlights.title: Weber Genesis E-325 那個升級溢價是真的值
highlights.body: Genesis E-325 NT$27,000 比 Spirit E-425 貴 NT$7,500，這個價差換到的是真材實料。PureBlu 漸縮燃燒管在低溫端的調節更細，對間接烹飪跟反向 Sear 很有感。重量級鑄鐵爐架留下的烙痕深度比 Spirit 的塗層爐架更明顯。底部櫃體把瓦斯桶藏起來還給你實用的收納空間，不像開放式骨架那樣什麼都裸露。一週開火超過一次、打算用十年的話，Genesis 是對的選擇。一個月開兩次火的話，Spirit 更聰明。

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 是想要「最後一台」的買家該買的
highlights.body: Prestige 500 RSIB 在 NT$65,000 有榜單上最強純火力：四口主燃燒器 82,000 BTU、16,000 BTU 的 Sizzle Zone 衝到 1,800°F 給你牛排館等級的焦痕、18,000 BTU 的紅外線後置旋轉烤標配。同價位每一台對手的旋轉烤都要再加 NT$12,000 才有。燃燒器跟爐架的終身保固是這個品類最強。Napoleon 是給「不想再買下一台烤肉爐」的屋主，這台跟著房子傳給下一個屋主。

highlights.title: Char-Broil Performance Series 是萬二內唯一真的能 Sear 的選擇
highlights.body: Performance Series 4-Burner with Sear Burner 在 NT$11,800 給你一支 13,000 BTU 的獨立 Sear 側燃燒器，這個配置在預算段是分隔「能用」跟「失望」的關鍵功能。瓷釉鑄鐵爐架的保溫足以留下像樣的烙痕。做工不是 Weber 等級，推車五金兩季後會晃，上蓋比我希望的薄。第一次想入手瓦斯烤肉爐、想先確認自己會不會持續用下去再砸 NT$18,000 買 Weber 的人，這台是對的起點。

highlights.title: Royal Gourmet GA5404B 除非預算上限就 NT$10,200 才考慮
highlights.body: GA5404B 用 NT$10,200 給你五口燃燒器加一支側燃燒器，紙上看起來像五口 Weber 除以三的價格。實際上燃燒器固定點的焊縫在台灣這種高濕度氣候一季就會出鏽斑、上蓋溫度計誤差 60°F、推車五金大概十五次烤肉後就會鬆動。如果 NT$10,200 真的是天花板、原本要買炭烤的話，這台的便利性贏炭烤。多 NT$1,600 跳到 Char-Broil 就有明顯升級的烤肉爐，這 NT$1,600 花得值得。

references.title: Best Gas Grills 2026: Father's Day Buying Guide
Weber Spirit E-425 Long-Term Review After Two Months
Post-Memorial Day Gas Grill Pricing Tracker: Father's Day Window

en.commentary: Friday morning four days past Memorial Day and the gas-grill category is sitting in the most important buying window of the year. Father's Day lands 23 days out on June 21, demand is about to spike across Home Depot and Lowe's, and the smart shopper buys this weekend before delivery and assembly queues stretch into mid-June. Weber kicked the MD banners off Tuesday but held strategic $50 to $100 trims on the Spirit E-425 and Genesis E-325 through this weekend to catch Father's Day buyers. Weber Spirit E-425 at $649 takes first because it remains the only sub-$1,000 gas grill that gets the math right at every level: four burners with two Boost Burners feeding a true Sear Zone, Snap-Jet electric ignition that fires on the first click every time, the full Weber 10-year warranty, and a Father's Day delivery window from Home Depot that still clears June 21 for orders placed this weekend. Weber Genesis E-325 at $899 holds second for the buyer who grills more than once a week. The PureBlu tapered burners and the cast-iron grates are a real quality upgrade that justifies the $250 premium over the Spirit. Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB at $2,099 takes third on raw cooking power with 82,000 BTU and the 1,800°F Sizzle Zone plus the rear infrared rotisserie that ships standard. Friday verdict for the Father's Day shopper: Spirit E-425 at $649 for the dad who deserves a real Weber, Genesis E-325 at $899 for the dad who grills weekly, Napoleon Prestige 500 at $2,099 for the dad who wants this to be his last grill.

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 at $649 is the Father's Day gas grill order this weekend
highlights.body: Weber kept a $50 post-Memorial Day trim on the Spirit E-425 through this Friday and $649 is the cleanest sub-$700 price this SKU hits in 2026. Four burners with two Boost Burners feeding a dedicated Sear Zone gets you 40 percent more heat density in the searing area than the standard Spirit. Snap-Jet electric ignition fires on the first click every time, which is the difference between a grill that gets used four nights a week and a grill that sits under a cover. The 10-year warranty is the strongest in the under-$700 segment. Home Depot delivery and assembly for Father's Day orders placed this weekend still clears June 21 with three weeks of margin.

highlights.title: Weber Genesis E-325 at $899 earns the Father's Day upgrade premium
highlights.body: Weber held the $899 sticker on the Genesis E-325 through this week and the $250 step up from the Spirit buys real hardware. PureBlu tapered burners modulate cleaner at the low end for indirect cooking and reverse-sear. Heavy cast-iron grates hold sear marks deeper than the Spirit's coated grates. The cabinet base hides the propane tank and gives usable storage. For the dad who grills more than once a week and plans to keep this grill for ten years, the Genesis is the right Father's Day call. The Weber 10-year warranty seals the long-term value.

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB at $2,099 is the last-grill Father's Day pick
highlights.body: Napoleon held the $2,099 price through Memorial Day and into this weekend. The Prestige 500 has the strongest pure cooking power on the list: 82,000 BTU across four main burners, a 16,000 BTU Sizzle Zone that hits 1,800°F for steakhouse sears, and an 18,000 BTU infrared rear rotisserie that ships standard. Every competing grill at the price charges $400 extra for the rotisserie burner. The lifetime warranty on burners and grates is the strongest in the category. For the dad who is done buying replacement grills and wants the one that gets passed to the next owner of the house, this is the Father's Day gift that closes the chapter.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五早上國殤日連假後第四天，瓦斯烤肉爐進入全年最重要的買氣窗口。父親節 6/21 還有 23 天，Home Depot 跟 Lowe's 需求即將爆衝，這個週末下單才能避開 6 月中組裝出貨大塞車。Weber 禮拜二把 MD 橫幅收掉，但 Spirit E-425 跟 Genesis E-325 維持 NT$1,600 到 NT$3,200 戰略性折扣到這個週末抓父親節買家。Weber Spirit E-425 NT$20,800 拿下第一，因為它還是 NT$32,000 以下唯一每個層面數學都對的瓦斯烤肉爐：四口燃燒器加兩支 Boost Burner 餵養真正的 Sear Zone、Snap-Jet 電子點火每次第一下就燃、完整 Weber 10 年保固、Home Depot 父親節出貨這個週末下單還趕得上 6/21。Weber Genesis E-325 NT$28,800 守第二，給一週開火超過一次的買家。PureBlu 漸縮燃燒管加鑄鐵爐架是真材實料的品質升級，多 NT$8,000 換到的是十年的差別。Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB NT$67,200 第三靠純火力，82,000 BTU 加 1,800°F 的 Sizzle Zone 加標配後置紅外線旋轉烤。禮拜五父親節結論：值得真正 Weber 的爸爸就 Spirit E-425 NT$20,800；每週開火的爸爸就 Genesis E-325 NT$28,800；想要最後一台的爸爸就 Napoleon Prestige 500 NT$67,200。

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 NT$20,800 是這個週末該下單的父親節烤肉爐
highlights.body: Weber 把 Spirit E-425 後國殤日 NT$1,600 折扣守到禮拜五，NT$20,800 是這個 SKU 在 2026 年最乾淨的 NT$22,400 以下價。四口燃燒器加兩支 Boost Burner 餵養獨立 Sear Zone，讓 Sear 區火力密度比標準 Spirit 多 40%。Snap-Jet 電子點火每次第一下就燃，這是「一週開四次火」跟「永遠蓋著防塵罩」之間的差別。10 年保固在 NT$22,400 以下大幅領先。Home Depot 這個週末下單組裝出貨還有三週緩衝到 6/21。

highlights.title: Weber Genesis E-325 NT$28,800 值得父親節升級溢價
highlights.body: Weber 把 Genesis E-325 NT$28,800 標價守進這個禮拜，比 Spirit 多 NT$8,000 換到的是真材實料。PureBlu 漸縮燃燒管在低溫端調節更細，對間接烹飪跟反向 Sear 很有感。重量級鑄鐵爐架留下的烙痕比 Spirit 的塗層爐架更深。底部櫃體把瓦斯桶藏起來還給實用收納空間。一週開火超過一次、打算用十年的爸爸，Genesis 是對的父親節選擇。Weber 10 年保固鎖住長期價值。

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB NT$67,200 是最後一台父親節選擇
highlights.body: Napoleon 把 NT$67,200 價格守過國殤日延進這個週末。Prestige 500 有榜單上最強純火力：四口主燃燒器 82,000 BTU、16,000 BTU 的 Sizzle Zone 衝到 1,800°F 給牛排館等級的焦痕、18,000 BTU 紅外線後置旋轉烤標配。同價位每一台對手的旋轉烤都要再加 NT$12,800 才有。燃燒器跟爐架的終身保固是這個品類最強。要送給「不想再買下一台烤肉爐」、希望這台跟著房子傳給下一個屋主的爸爸，這就是收尾的父親節禮物。

references.title: Best Gas Grills 2026: Saturday Backyard Buyer's Guide
Weber vs Napoleon: Father's Day Showdown
Gas Grill Pricing Snapshot: Post-Memorial Day Week

en.commentary:
Saturday May 30 puts gas grill inventory in the post-Memorial Day Father's Day pre-buy window and the pricing tells the story. The Weber Spirit E-425 holds first at $899 across Home Depot, Lowes, and Weber direct. Memorial Day pulled it briefly to $799 and that floor is gone, but the value gap to Genesis E-325 at $1,299 keeps the Spirit as my default recommendation for households buying their first serious gas grill. Three stainless steel burners delivering 38,000 BTU, porcelain-enameled cast iron grates, and the 10-year warranty on all parts make this a 15-year backyard fixture.

Weber Genesis E-325 holds second at $1,299 and is the right call for households where weeknight grilling is a 4-plus night per week ritual. The Sear Station gives the high-heat zone that Spirit lacks, and the side burner enables one-grill weeknight meals. Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB at $1,699 holds third on the premium bracket and the infrared rear rotisserie burner is the feature that separates a grill from a backyard oven for buyers cooking whole chickens on Saturday afternoon.

Weber Summit S-470 at $2,499 holds fourth on the absolute premium tier, and Broil King Regal S590 Pro at $1,899 holds fifth as the dual-tube infrared rotisserie alternative. Father's Day gift shipping for grills at Home Depot ground closes June 12, and Saturday weekend hosting buyers are loading the Spirit E-425 and the Genesis E-325 into carts at the highest rate this week. For dads who already grill, the Genesis is the meaningful upgrade. For households building their first backyard, the Spirit is the answer.

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 at $899 is the first-serious-grill default
highlights.body: Three stainless burners at 38,000 BTU, porcelain-enameled cast iron grates, 10-year warranty on all parts. Memorial Day $799 floor expired Monday and $899 has held through Saturday at Home Depot and Weber direct. For households buying their first serious gas grill or a Father's Day gift in this bracket, the Spirit is the unambiguous answer. Ground shipping cutoff for Father's Day at Home Depot is June 12.

highlights.title: Weber Genesis E-325 at $1,299 is the weeknight-grilling-dad upgrade
highlights.body: Sear Station for high-heat zone Spirit lacks, side burner for one-grill weeknight meals, 38,000 BTU main with 10-year warranty. For households where grilling is a 4-plus night per week ritual, the Genesis earns its premium. Father's Day gift orders should commit by June 12 for guaranteed delivery.

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB at $1,699 wins the rotisserie household
highlights.body: Infrared rear rotisserie burner separates a grill from a backyard oven. For Saturday afternoon whole-chicken cooking or weekend pork-loin rotisserie sessions, the Prestige 500 is the rational premium pick. Napoleon's 15-year burner warranty plus the night-light knobs close the experience gap to Weber at slightly higher pricing.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/30 星期六把瓦斯烤肉爐推進到國殤日後、父親節前下單窗口，價格說明一切。Weber Spirit E-425 守第一 USD$899（代購 NT$29,700），Home Depot、Lowes、Weber 官網都守住。國殤日短暫降到 USD$799、那個地板結束了，但跟 Genesis E-325 USD$1,299 的價差讓 Spirit 還是我推薦第一次買認真瓦斯爐家庭的預設選擇。三支不鏽鋼燃燒器 38,000 BTU、瓷釉鑄鐵烤網、全零件 10 年保固，這是 15 年的後院固定資產。

Weber Genesis E-325 守第二 USD$1,299（代購 NT$42,900），適合一週烤肉四次以上的家庭。Sear Station 提供 Spirit 沒有的高熱區，側燃燒器讓週間單爐一餐搞定。Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB USD$1,699（代購 NT$56,100）守第三高階組，紅外線後旋轉燃燒器是把烤肉爐跟後院烤箱分開的功能，星期六下午整隻雞的買家適用。

Weber Summit S-470 USD$2,499（代購 NT$82,500）守第四絕對高階組，Broil King Regal S590 Pro USD$1,899（代購 NT$62,700）守第五雙管紅外線旋轉替代。Home Depot 父親節地面運送截止 6/12，星期六週末宴客買家這週把 Spirit E-425 跟 Genesis E-325 拉進購物車最猛。已經會烤肉的爸爸，Genesis 是有意義的升級。第一次打造後院的家庭，Spirit 就是答案。

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 NT$29,700 是第一台認真瓦斯爐預設選擇
highlights.body: 三支不鏽鋼燃燒器 38,000 BTU、瓷釉鑄鐵烤網、全零件 10 年保固。國殤日 USD$799 地板週一結束、USD$899 守到星期六在 Home Depot 跟 Weber 官網。第一次買認真瓦斯爐的家庭或這個預算的父親節禮物，Spirit 就是答案。Home Depot 父親節地面運送截止 6/12。台灣代購含運約 NT$29,700。

highlights.title: Weber Genesis E-325 NT$42,900 是週間烤肉爸爸的升級
highlights.body: Sear Station 提供 Spirit 沒有的高熱區、側燃燒器讓週間單爐搞定、38,000 BTU 主燃燒器加 10 年保固。一週烤肉四次以上的家庭，Genesis 的溢價有意義。父親節禮物訂單 6/12 前下單才保證到貨。

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB NT$56,100 拿下旋轉烤家庭冠軍
highlights.body: 紅外線後旋轉燃燒器把烤肉爐跟後院烤箱分開。星期六下午烤整隻雞或週末旋轉豬里肌的買家，Prestige 500 是理性高階選擇。Napoleon 15 年燃燒器保固加旋鈕夜燈，把跟 Weber 的體驗差距縮小到稍高定價內。

references.title: Napoleon VS Weber: Which Gas Grill is Best in 2026?
Best BBQ Grills for Summer 2026: Top Gas, Pellet and Charcoal

en.commentary:
We are at peak gas grill season, with Father's Day on June 21 driving the strongest purchase intent of the year and post-Memorial Day grilling routines now fully established across most of the country. The Weber Spirit E-425 holds rank one through a combination of cooking power, heat distribution, and the most important variable in grill ownership: reliability. Its 9.6 value score is the best on this list, and for a four-burner grill at its price point that delivers genuine searing capability alongside a side burner for sauces and sides, the E-425 makes a near-irrefutable case as the rational purchase for most families.

The Weber Genesis E-325 at rank two continues to earn its position through the best even-heat score on the list at 9.5. Three-burner efficiency with precise zone control makes this the grill for people who care about cooking technique rather than raw BTU output. The Flavorizer bars, porcelain-enameled cooking grates, and Weber's warranty program make the Genesis the longer-term investment argument.

Napoleon's Prestige 500 RSIB at rank three is the most powerful option in this tier, posting a 9.7 cooking power score. The infrared side and rear burners give it a rotisserie and searing capability that neither Weber option can match, and the build quality with stainless steel construction is genuinely premium. The value score of 7.5 reflects the price honestly, this is a grill for serious cooks who use every feature.

For Father's Day specifically, the Weber Spirit E-310 at rank six deserves attention as the best under-500-dollar three-burner option. Strong build quality from a trusted brand at an accessible price point is the right profile for many gift buyers who want to give something meaningful without stretching to four-figure territory.

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 Is the Rational Pick for Most Families
highlights.body: Four burners, a side burner, genuine searing capability, and Weber's reliability record combine to make the E-425 the default recommendation for most buyers. Its 9.6 value score is the best on this list, which means you are getting premium-tier performance without premium-tier pricing. This is the Father's Day grill purchase that most households will not regret.

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 Leads on Raw Performance
highlights.body: The 9.7 cooking power score and infrared side and rear burners make the Prestige 500 RSIB the most capable grill on this list. Rotisserie cooking and serious high-heat searing capability push it into territory that Weber's Spirit and Genesis lineups cannot reach. The value trade-off is real, but for dedicated grill enthusiasts this is the right tool.

highlights.title: Father's Day Drives Peak Gas Grill Purchase Season
highlights.body: With Father's Day three weeks out, gas grill demand is at its annual peak. Weber and Napoleon are the two brands consistently at the top of recommendations from Consumer Reports and independent testing labs. Both are running Father's Day promotions worth checking before the June 21 deadline.

zh-tw.commentary:
現在是美國瓦斯烤爐銷售的黃金三週。五月底的陣亡將士紀念日假期剛過，六月二十一日父親節快到了，這段時間是一年裡面瓦斯烤爐購買意願最高的時期，各大品牌也都在這個時間點推出重點促銷。

Weber Spirit E-425 守住榜首的理由很具體：四爐頭設計、側爐頭可以同時煮醬汁或玉米，火力夠強可以真正做出 Sear 的焦皮效果，而且 Weber 品牌的耐用度在市場上有長達幾十年的口碑驗證。CP 值評分 9.6 是這份清單最高的，意思是這個價位段能買到的表現已經非常接近更貴的機型。

Weber Genesis E-325 排第二靠的是均勻熱場評分 9.5，整個清單最高。三爐頭的精準分區控溫讓你可以同時用直火煎和間接加熱做烤，對烹飪技術有要求的人會特別欣賞這種設計。Flavorizer 導油板和琺瑯烤網都是為了長期使用而設計的，Weber 保固計劃也是業界標竿。

Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB 排第三靠的是火力，烹飪功率評分 9.7 是清單最高。紅外線側爐和後爐頭讓它能做旋轉烤肉架料理，這兩款 Weber 都做不到。不鏽鋼機身構造也確實高一個等級。

六月父親節送禮的話，Weber Spirit E-310 是預算控制在一定範圍內的最佳推薦，三爐頭、Weber 品牌品質保證，售價相對親民，是很多家庭的合理選擇。

highlights.title: Weber Spirit E-425 是大多數家庭最務實的選擇
highlights.body: 四爐頭加側爐、Weber 可靠度口碑、最高的 CP 值評分，Spirit E-425 是這份清單最均衡的推薦。六月父親節送禮或自用，這台是大多數人買了不會後悔的機型。

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 火力最強、功能最完整
highlights.body: 烹飪功率評分 9.7、紅外線側爐和後爐頭支援旋轉烤架料理，Prestige 500 RSIB 的功能完整度是清單裡面最高的。認真玩戶外料理的人才能把它的功能全部用到，這是它最適合的買家輪廓。

highlights.title: 父親節帶動瓦斯烤爐銷售衝高峰
highlights.body: 三週後就是父親節，這是美國全年瓦斯烤爐銷售最高峰。Weber 和 Napoleon 都有推出限時促銷活動，Consumer Reports 的品牌可靠度評比兩者都是頂尖表現，在這段時間入手時機和折扣力道都是一年裡最好的。

references.title: The Best Weber Grills of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
Best BBQ Grills of 2026 for Every Budget Fully Tested & Reviewed

en.commentary: We are heading into peak grilling season and the 2026 reviews are landing in a way that validates the top of my list rather than shaking it. The reinvented Weber Spirit E-425C is getting deserved attention this spring: it gives you four burners, room to cook for a crew, and two Boost Burners that deliver 40 percent more power in the sear zone. That combination of capacity, even heat, and a genuine searing punch at a mainstream price is exactly why the Spirit E-425 sits at rank one for me. It is the grill I tell most families to buy and stop overthinking. The Genesis E-325 holds second as the upgrade pick, with thicker build quality and the most even grates Weber makes in this class, and the new Genesis SX-335 smart variant shows where Weber is pushing premium buyers who want connected cooking. Napoleon's Prestige 500 RSIB keeps third on raw cooking power and that signature infrared rear and side burner combo, which is still the setup I reach for when I want rotisserie and high-heat searing in one cart. Nothing in the spring 2026 review cycle displaces these anchors. Weber's durability and consistent heat keep showing up across independent tests, and the Spirit line in particular keeps winning the value argument. I am holding the full order steady today. If you are buying for this summer, the Spirit E-425 is the safe, high-confidence pick, and the timing right now is good before peak-season demand tightens stock on the popular models.

highlights.title: Spirit E-425C earns rank one
highlights.body: Four burners, crew-sized capacity, and two Boost Burners delivering 40 percent more sear-zone power at a mainstream price. This is the grill I tell most families to just buy.

highlights.title: Genesis E-325 is the upgrade
highlights.body: Thicker build and the most even grates Weber makes in this class keep the Genesis at rank two for buyers who want to step up.

highlights.title: Genesis SX-335 brings smart cooking
highlights.body: Weber's new smart Genesis variant shows where premium connected grilling is heading, a sign the brand is investing at the top.

highlights.title: Napoleon Prestige 500 for power
highlights.body: Raw output plus infrared rear and side burners hold the Prestige 500 RSIB at third. Still my reach-for grill when I want rotisserie and high-heat searing together.

highlights.title: Buy before peak season tightens stock
highlights.body: Independent 2026 tests keep crowning Weber on durability and even heat. With summer demand rising, now is a good time to lock in the popular Spirit and Genesis models.

zh-tw.commentary: 燒烤旺季要來了，2026 的評測一篇篇出爐，剛好是在幫我榜單頂端背書，而不是把它搖動。改款的 Weber Spirit E-425C 這個春天受到應得的關注，四口爐、空間夠大可以一次烤給一桌人，還有兩個 Boost Burner 在搶火區多給你 40% 火力。容量、均熱、加上真正夠猛的搶火能力，又落在主流價位，這就是 Spirit E-425 在我這裡坐第一的原因。這台就是我會叫大多數家庭直接買、別再想太多的那台。在台灣它落在 NT$25,000 上下這個帶，CP 值很實在。Genesis E-325 守第二，是進階首選，用料更厚，烤網均熱是 Weber 這級距做得最好的，新的 Genesis SX-335 智慧版則點出 Weber 想往哪推那些要連網烤肉的高階買家。Napoleon Prestige 500 RSIB 靠純火力跟它招牌的紅外線後燒與側燒組合守第三，想要一台車上同時搞定旋轉烤跟高溫搶火，我還是會伸手拿它。2026 春季這輪評測沒有任何一台撼動這幾個定錨。Weber 的耐用度跟穩定均熱在各家獨立測試裡一直出現，Spirit 系列在性價比這題上也一直贏。我今天整份排序維持不動。如果你是為這個夏天買，Spirit E-425 就是安全又高信心的選擇，而且現在時機不錯，趁旺季需求把熱門型號的庫存吃緊之前先下手。

highlights.title: Spirit E-425C 拿下第一
highlights.body: 四口爐、一桌人份的容量、兩個 Boost Burner 在搶火區多給 40% 火力，又落在主流價位。這就是我會叫大多數家庭直接買的那台。

highlights.title: Genesis E-325 是進階款
highlights.body: 用料更厚、烤網均熱是 Weber 這級距最好的，讓 Genesis 守在第二，給想升級的買家。

highlights.title: Genesis SX-335 帶來智慧烤肉
highlights.body: Weber 新的智慧版 Genesis 點出高階連網烤肉要往哪走，也代表這品牌在頂端持續投資。

highlights.title: 要火力就看 Napoleon Prestige 500
highlights.body: 純火力加上紅外線後燒與側燒，讓 Prestige 500 RSIB 守第三。想一台車同時搞定旋轉烤跟高溫搶火，我還是拿它。

highlights.title: 趁旺季庫存吃緊前先買
highlights.body: 2026 獨立測試持續把 Weber 推上耐用與均熱寶座。夏天需求升溫，現在正好趁熱門的 Spirit 跟 Genesis 缺貨前鎖定。
